title: get_block_range stream has no per-message timeout
description: scanner.rs scan_to_tip calls get_block_range then loops stream.message().await? with no timeout on individual messages. If lightwalletd goes silent mid-stream (partial hang, half-open TCP), the scanner blocks forever, freezing spawn_scanner permanently. Trigger: any lightwalletd endpoint that sends some blocks then stalls. Fix: wrap each stream.message() with tokio::time::timeout.
